title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Axe India International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Axe India International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Axe India International Enterprises! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Bhubaneswar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Axe India International Enterprises:
Axe India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Axe India International Enterprises!
